alkylation reagent: alkylated with iodoacetamide (30 mM, room temperature, 45 min in dark)
alkylation concentration: alkylated with iodoacetamide (30 mM, room temperature, 45 min in dark)
cleavage agent: digested with trypsin in a trypsin-to-protein ratio of 1:20 at 37 °C overnight
enrichment method: the phosphopeptides were enriched by Titansphere Phos-TiO Kit (GL Science)
fragmentation method: MS/MS spectra were collected using collision-induced dissociation.
instrument: analyzed by MS using a Dionex Ultimate 3000 nano-UHPLC system LC coupled with a Thermo Scientific Orbitrap Velos Pro mass spectrometer.
labeling: the enriched phosphopeptides were analyzed by MS using a Dionex Ultimate 3000 nano-UHPLC system LC coupled with a Thermo Scientific Orbitrap Velos Pro mass spectrometer.
